title: Calm Customer - Product Return Request
description: A customer wants to return a product that doesn't fit their needs. They are calm and reasonable but need guidance on the return process.

persona.name: Danielle
persona.goal: Successfully return the product and get a refund

background_context: The customer purchased a wireless headset online 10 days ago. The product works fine but doesn't fit comfortably for extended use. They have the original packaging and receipt. They're within the 30-day return window and just need to know how to proceed.
success_criteria: Thank the customer for their business
common_mistakes: Making the return process sound complicated
Not expressing understanding for the inconvenience
Forgetting to provide all necessary return details
Not confirming the customer understands the next steps
Missing opportunity to suggest alternative products
